title: Update year to 2026 in HeroSection stats

requirements.text: In the HeroSection component, locate the stat element at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[1]/div[7]/div[3]/div[3]/div[1] and update its text content to display '2026'.
acceptanceCriteria: The stat element identified by the given XPath in the HeroSection displays '2026'.
All other stat elements and content in the HeroSection remain unchanged.
The dark overlay and all text content remain fully readable on top of the hero background.

constraints: Only the element at the specified XPath should be changed — no other text in the app should be modified.
nonGoals: Modifying the Footer copyright year or any other year references outside the targeted element.
